# Bug Report

## Summary
A clear and short description of the bug.

## Environment
- **Brovan version:**
- **OS:**
- **Architecture / CPU:**
- **Relevant emulator settings:**
- **Input file / binary type:**

## Steps to Reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What happened instead.

## Frequency
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Rarely
- [ ] Once

## Reproduction Details
Include anything that makes the issue easier to reproduce:
- Sample binary
- Config file
- Logs
- Screenshots
- Output / trace / disassembly snippet

## Error Messages
Paste any error text here.

## Additional Context
Any other details that might help diagnose the issue.
